description: You are an RF engineer preparing for a field test. Configure GPredict with a ground station named Dallas_Field (32.7767 N, 96.7970 W, 130m) and a tracking module named Field_Testing assigned to it. The module should include satellites FO-29 (NORAD 24278), RS-44 (NORAD 44909), and AO-73 (NORAD 39444) using a 'List Only' layout. Export future pass prediction tables for FO-29 to ~/Documents/FO29_passes.txt and for RS-44 to ~/Documents/RS44_passes.txt. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
